steps.title: Use statement word order
steps.content: The blank completes a relative clause describing the mouthpiece. Because the sentence is a statement, the clause needs subject-before-verb order and a period.

steps.title: Compare the endings
steps.content: Choice A and Choice D invert the order as a question would. Choice B has correct word order but the wrong question mark. Choice C has declarative order and a period. The answer is C.
